price: Als sein Herr ihn im geheiligten Tal Tuwa rief:
arabic: إِذۡ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلۡوَادِ ٱلۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: idh nādāhu rabbuhu bil-wādi al-muqadasi ṭuwan
